# customise_text { #cdmconnector.customise_text }

```python
customise_text(x, custom=None, keep=None)
```

Style text: replace underscores with spaces and convert to sentence case.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type               | Description                                              | Default    |
|--------|--------------------|----------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| x      | str or list\[str\] | Text to style.                                           | _required_ |
| custom | dict               | Specific overrides mapping original -> replacement text. | `None`     |
| keep   | list\[str\]        | Values to keep unchanged.                                | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type               | Description   |
|--------|--------------------|---------------|
|        | str or list\[str\] | Styled text.  |
